entity.summary: Arbitrum automated-market-maker exchange using ve(3,3) tokenomics derived from Velodrome. The protocol remains documented and tracked with low but non-zero liquidity.
entity.notes: First-party launch documentation records mainnet Epoch 0 on April 5, 2023. HEI uses limited because the protocol remains reachable and independently tracked but current TVL is small.

events.title: Auragi Finance mainnet launched
events.description: Auragi opened its Arbitrum mainnet exchange, governance allocation, and first voting epoch.
events.notes: The first-party launch timeline identifies April 5 as Epoch 0 and the testnet documentation independently ties the token-generation and mainnet transition to that date.

evidence.title: Auragi Finance launch timeline
evidence.notes: First-party timeline states that mainnet was live and Epoch 0 began on April 5, 2023.

evidence.title: Auragi Finance testnet guide
evidence.notes: First-party testnet documentation identifies April 5 as the token-generation and mainnet transition date.

evidence.title: Auragi Finance documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation defines Auragi as a Velodrome-derived ve(3,3) automated market maker and links to its application.

evidence.title: Auragi Finance protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Current independent tracking shows low but non-zero TVL and preserves the protocol's DEX identity.
